---
title: "Why Artificial Intelligence Didn't Persuade Me Out of Learning to Code"
description: How complexity and chaos undermine machine learning models
date: 2025-08-07
categories: [Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Learn to Code, Bioinformatics]
draft: false
image: woof.png
comments:
  giscus:
    repo: ammaraldawood/ammaraldawood.github.io
# author:
#   - name: Ammar Aldawood
#     url: https://ammaraldawood.github.io/
#     orcid: 0009-0001-5777-482X
date-modified: last-modified
citation: 
  url: https://ammaraldawood.com/blog/posts/2025-08-05

format:
    html:
        css: styles.css
---
